mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blog_image_drafts WHERE draft_id = #{draftId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY display_order
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_image_drafts (draft_id, image_url, is_thumbnail, display_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{img.draftId}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.isThumbnail}, #{img.displayOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_image_drafts SET is_deleted = true WHERE draft_id = #{draftId}
